subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God and faithful companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your general letter was filled with the essence of the sealed wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی و یاران باوفای عبدالبهاء نامه عمومی شما مضمون رحیق مختوم بود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
